deferredContours.reason: ML service is not part of the currently documented release authority and must be hardened or retired before activation.
Airflow is not part of the currently documented release authority and must be hardened or retired before activation.
Helm manifests are retained design assets, not accepted deployment authority, until security contexts pass blocking IaC checks.
Kubernetes manifests are retained design assets, not accepted deployment authority, until privileged init behavior is removed.
